nodes.name: coding-style.md
nodes.summary: Ruby and Rails coding-style rule extending the common style guide: targets Ruby 3.3+/YJIT, RuboCop (rubocop-rails-omakase), Rails naming and directory conventions, and specific-exception error handling.
nodes.languageNotes: Front-matter scopes the rule to **/*.rb, **/*.rake, Gemfile, *.gemspec, and config.ru paths.

nodes.name: hooks.md
nodes.summary: Ruby and Rails hook rule extending common hooks: prescribes PostToolUse tooling (RuboCop, Brakeman, tests, bundler-audit), commit-time warnings for debugger/raw-SQL/destructive migrations, and CI gate command suggestions.
nodes.languageNotes: Front-matter scopes the rule to Ruby sources, Gemfile/Gemfile.lock, and config/routes.rb.

nodes.name: patterns.md
nodes.summary: Ruby and Rails architectural-patterns rule extending common patterns: Rails-way-first MVC, when to extract service/query/form objects, PostgreSQL vs SQLite persistence, Solid Queue/Sidekiq jobs, Hotwire frontend, and Rails 8 vs Devise auth.
nodes.languageNotes: Front-matter scopes the rule to Ruby sources, Gemfile, app/**/*.erb, and config/routes.rb.

nodes.name: security.md
nodes.summary: Ruby and Rails security rule extending common security: CSRF and strong parameters, parameterized Active Record SQL, session rotation and account-recovery hardening, bundler-audit/Brakeman dependency checks, and template/upload/background-input web safety.
nodes.languageNotes: Front-matter scopes the rule to Ruby sources, Gemfile/Gemfile.lock, config/routes.rb, and encrypted credentials files.

nodes.name: testing.md
nodes.summary: Ruby and Rails testing rule extending common testing: Minitest vs RSpec framework choice, the test pyramid across model/request/system layers, fixtures vs factory_bot, project-local test commands, and SimpleCov coverage discipline.
nodes.languageNotes: Front-matter scopes the rule to Ruby sources, Gemfile, test/**, spec/**, and config/routes.rb.
